name: @chio-protocol/workers
description: Chio Protocol Cloudflare Workers SDK using wasm-pack bundler artifacts

scripts.test:miniflare: bun run build && bun -e "import { Miniflare } from 'miniflare'; const mf = new Miniflare({ modules: true, scriptPath: 'dist/index.js', compatibilityDate: '2026-04-27', modulesRules: [{ type: 'ESModule', include: ['**/*.js'], fallthrough: true }, { type: 'CompiledWasm', include: ['**/*.wasm'], fallthrough: true }] }); const res = await mf.dispatchFetch('https://workers.test/__chio_workers_smoke'); const body = await res.json(); await mf.dispose(); if (!res.ok || body.package !== '@chio-protocol/workers' || body.wasmTarget !== 'bundler' || body.verifyReceipt !== true) throw new Error('Miniflare smoke failed: ' + JSON.stringify(body)); console.log('miniflare smoke: 1 passed');"
